issue_title: Remix Vite: Rehype and Remark plugins don't get executed in SSR run
issue_body_preview:
Remix will execute twice per https://github.com/remix-run/remix/issues/8578 and that's fine however on the second execution transform is called with the same documents and context, and rehype and remark do not get triggered again causing issues as the SSR bundle ends up with empty values. 

My conte
test_description_zh: 在 Remix Vite 项目中，配置 rehype 和 remark 插件处理内容集合（content-collections），访问使用了这些插件处理后内容的页面，观察 SSR 渲染结果中经过 rehype/remark 处理的内容是否正确显示。
expected_result_zh: 页面在 SSR 渲染后，经过 rehype 和 remark 插件处理的内容应正确显示，不应出现空值或内容缺失的情况。第二次执行（SSR 阶段）时，rehype 和 remark 插件的处理结果应与首次执行一致，页面内容完整呈现。
